text.heading: THE EFFECT OF FAKE DRUGS ON THE NIGERIA NATION AND IT CITIZENRY.
text.p: I would like to inform you, or draw your attention the effect of fake drugs to our youths, and the entire nation:

The manufacturing of fakes drugs in the Country has causes alot death, to Nigeria people both young and old. This drug are purchase by big business and smugle to drugs store in the villages and at times in the big city of Nigeria.
This drugs when manufacture were push to the hospital in the phar-macist department which if not check causes untimly death.
This drugs also causes people to run mad because that is not what is require to cure his illness.
This drugs also causes rashes and a spot on the body.
This drugs if not check causes staunted growth or reduces the rate of growth in children, therefore lead to death.
The drugs can leads to destruction of womb or Uterus in women. fake drugs can also destroy the feotus in the womb.

Consequently the effect of this drugs has causes or spoilt the Name of the Nation abroad, and Nigeria as a nation is been regarded as the corrupt and untrusted in the world. And also cause untimely death of our people.
